industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Dlaboratory Sweden AB (publ)
summary: Dlaboratory Sweden AB (publ) operates as a cleantech company in Sweden. It provides dInsight Analytics platform that connects and collects grid data; analyses to unlock critical information; categorizes and visualizes; and sets the information in meaningful context and transform into actionable knowledge. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Lund, Sweden.
